title: Israel ‘conducting stubborn negotiations’ with US over continuing its Lebanon troop deployment, officials say

snapshot.title: Israel ‘conducting stubborn negotiations’ with US over continuing its Lebanon troop deployment, officials say
snapshot.description: JERUSALEM: Israel is holding negotiations with the US as it seeks to continue its deployment of ​troops in southern Lebanon, two Israeli officials including a senior Israeli official close to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu told Reuters on Thursday.
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Israel ‘conducting stubborn negotiations’ with US over continuing its Lebanon troop deployment, officials say | Arab News
